## Checklist

- [ ] I read `contributing.md`.
- [ ] The entry is alphabetical within its section.
- [ ] The description explains why the tool is useful, not just what category it belongs to.
- [ ] Any catches are mentioned: upload required, file-size cap, account needed, paid limits, platform limit.
- [ ] Markers are correct: 🔒, `OSS`, `$`.
